clusters.justification: Captures the broad processing of emotional valence, arousal, and mood states primarily associated with co-activations in the anterior insula, amygdala, and dorsal anterior cingulate cortex.
Represents the macroscopic integration of reward processing, subjective value estimation, and motivated decision-making fundamentally subserved by ventromedial prefrontal and striatal circuitry.
Encompasses self-referential processing, mental state attribution, and abstraction that functionally unites the transmodal cortical regions of the default mode network.
